description: Keel AI-SDLC plugin marketplace by Amar Singh (@creativemyntra). Provides the full keel pipeline for Claude Code and Claude Desktop.

plugins.name: keel
plugins.description: Complete AI-SDLC pipeline for Claude Code and Claude Desktop. 8 autonomous agents: Brainstorm -> Requirements -> Design -> TDD -> QA -> Security -> Deploy -> Release. v3.0 stack: CakePHP 4.4 / PHP 8.1 (production-proven). Laravel/Django/Rails on v3.1 roadmap.
